about.intro: Haeun Sun is a visual editor and motion designer focused on clear storytelling, refined pacing, and image-led portfolio experiences. She works across motion identity, editorial video, VFX references, and campaign visuals.
about.name: HAEUN SUN
about.field: Motion Design, Video Editing, Visual Direction
about.tools: AfterEffects, Cinema4D, Octane, Figma, ComfyUI, AI Tools

history.text: Built a motion identity and editorial showreel system for portfolio presentation.
Developed short-form social motion templates and VFX breakdown references.
Worked on animation timing studies, title sequence concepts, and documentary edit boards.

works.label:
MOTION
IDENTITY
works.title: Motion Identity System
works.description: A compact visual identity study built around restrained typography, rhythmic cuts, and a monochrome base. The system is designed to work across title cards, reels, and short campaign edits.

works.label:
EDITORIAL
SHOWREEL
works.title: Editorial Showreel 2026
works.description: A showreel page concept focused on pacing and contrast. The piece combines atmospheric stills, quick motion beats, and sharp typographic emphasis for a portfolio opening sequence.

works.background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(12, 52, 38, 0.95), rgba(6, 11, 16, 0.88)), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 24%, rgba(255,255,255,.15) 24% 25%)
works.label:
VFX
BREAKDOWN
works.title: VFX Breakdown Study
works.description: A reference-led breakdown format for analyzing visual effects layers. The detail layout prioritizes clean comparisons between original plates, compositing stages, and final frames.

works.label:
SOCIAL
CAMPAIGN
works.title: Social Campaign Motion Pack
works.description: A modular motion pack for short-form social posts. The system uses simple framing rules, fast-reading text, and reusable animated accents.

works.label:
MUSIC
VIDEO
works.title: Music Video Visual Notes
works.description: A black-and-white visual direction study for a live performance video. The focus is on framing, texture, silhouette, and a raw documentary tone.

works.label:
ANIMATION
TIMING
works.title: Animation Timing Study
works.description: A timing reference board for studying anticipation, smear frames, and impact poses. The page presents motion thinking in a quiet gallery format.

works.label:
TITLE
SEQUENCE
works.title: Title Sequence Exploration
works.description: A type-led opening sequence concept using scale, cropping, and stark contrast. The design keeps the interface minimal so the typography carries the visual energy.

works.label:
DOCU
EDIT
works.title: Documentary Edit Board
works.description: A structured edit board for documentary material. It organizes interview moments, cutaway rhythm, and emotional beats into a simple browsing experience.

works.label:
BRAND
REEL
works.title: Brand Reel Direction
works.description: A restrained brand reel concept for collecting campaign visuals. The direction balances polished image-making with an archive-like portfolio structure.
